title: Mini Sans Fight
description: This resourse pack adds an animated Sans scripted attack to your inventory.
body:
# **Optifine or CIT Resewn is required!** **CIT Resewn also needs OptiGUI!** This ResoursePack adds animated Sans attack to your inventory.
P.S. Works only with vanilla GUI
![Character under craft table in inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7414d0e3e5f6ce502b557e9830bee004d0f8152.png)
